source_pr.title: parser: add complex query bench
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
This PR does not solve anything. It just adds a new bench function in the parser package. 

### What is changed and how it works?

We add a new bench function in `bench_test.go`. 

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

Code changes

Side effects
- No side effect

Related changes

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Patch adds parser benchmark queries and refactors parser generator output; it does not contain a targeted stabilization change for flaky tests.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: AND CODE_VALUE = '156' ORDER BY BANK,CODE_TYPE,CODE_VALUE`, (parser/bench_test.go)
